text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I step closer to the glass-walled room, illuminated by a vivid purple light. The environment is stark and modern, compelling me to wonder what kind of research or innovation happens in such a carefully curated space. As I move inside and read the words on the wall about 'R+D'—research and development—I am struck by the interplay of human creativity and technology. The design provokes reflection about how our environments shape our minds. It’s energizing, yet mysterious, to occupy a place so clearly dedicated to new possibilities and the future.
